title: Monstie Hunter: Baby Monster Collector!
description: A Monster Hunter mod, but without the hunting! Discover and collect baby monsters!
body:
REQUIRED DEPENDENCIES: GECKOLIB

Monster Hunter/ all credit belongs to CAPCOM!
![-](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44cfb8ec2475334595e6ef5b8dfe8050a4f68949_0.webp)
### WELCOME to the FIRST UPDATE of...
# Monstie Hunter: Baby Monster Collector!

The world is VAST and full of DANGEROUS monsters, BUT..... not all of them are a threat! Explore the world and encounter baby monsters!

Plus, a Seikret that you can mount!

_This is a passion project of mine, and I'm hoping to add more monsters, armors, and items in future updates!_

MONSTERS IN THIS VERSION + TIPS!

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Tigrex - Found in dry biomes and can be befriended with a few different kinds of meats!

Brute Tigrex - Found in dry biomes and can be befriended with a few different kinds of meats!

Rathalos - Found in plains + savanna biomes and can be befriended with a few different kinds of meats!

Azure Rathalos - Found in plains + savanna biomes and can be befriended with a few different kinds of meats!

Silver Rathalos - Found in savanna + windswept biomes and can be befriended with a few different kinds of meats!

Barioth - Found in snowy biomes and can be befriended with a few different kinds of meats!

Odogaron - Found in cherry, meadow, and soul sand valleys and can be befriended with beef + bones!

Ebony Odogaron - Found in cherry, meadow, and soul sand valleys and can be befriended with beef + bones!

Tobi-Kadachi - Found in forests + jungles and can be befriended with a few different kinds of meats!

Viper Tobi-Kadachi - Found in snowy, cold biomes and can be befriended with a few different kinds of meats!

Yian Kut-Ku - Found in plains, forests, and jungles and can be befriended with honeycomb and tropical fish!

Blue Yian Kut-Ku - Found in dark/old growth forests, bamboo jungles, and windswept forests and can be befriended with honeycomb and tropical fish!

Nargacuga - Found in forests and jungles and can be befriended with a few different kinds of meats! ONLY SPAWNS AT NIGHT OR IN THE DARK!

Green Nargacuga - Found in forests and jungles and can be befriended with a few different kinds of meats! ONLY SPAWNS AT NIGHT OR IN THE DARK!

Baby Seikret - Found in plains, savannahs, sparse jungle.. pretty much anywhere that's somewhat flat! Can be befriended with a few different kinds of seeds! If you give one a GOLDEN CARROT, it'll grow into a fully-grown Seikret you can ride around!

Seikret - Doesn't spawn naturally and can be befriended with seeds!

Gore Magala - A mysterious monster only found in dark forests or the deep dark... can be befriended with a few different kinds of meats. ONLY SPAWNS AT NIGHT OR IN THE DARK! If given a TOTEM OF UNDYING, a Gore Magala will transform into a Shagaru Magala.

Shagaru Magala - Doesn't spawn naturally and can be befriended with meats!

</details>
